faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About the
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our Hispanic clinic Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner in Houston, TX.
faq.moreQuestions: Have more questions about our Hispanic clinic? Contact us now.
faq.seoText: Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner is the Hispanic clinic that answers all your questions in Spanish. Our Hispanic clinic in Houston is committed to providing clear and transparent information to the Latino community.
faq.q1: Is Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner a Hispanic clinic with Spanish-speaking care?
faq.a1: Yes, Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner is a Hispanic clinic located in Houston, TX. All our staff speaks Spanish and we offer medical care completely in your language so you feel comfortable and understood during your visit.
faq.q2: What services does this Hispanic clinic in Houston offer?
faq.a2: Our Hispanic clinic offers general medicine, gynecology, pediatrics, clinical laboratory, ultrasound, Green Card I-693 exams, minor emergencies and chronic disease management. All services are available in Spanish.
faq.q3: Do I need an appointment to visit Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?
faq.a3: We accept patients with and without appointments at our Hispanic clinic. However, we recommend scheduling an appointment to reduce wait time. You can call +1 (346) 226-5820.
faq.q4: What are the Hispanic clinic's hours of operation?
faq.a4: Our Hispanic clinic in Houston is open Monday through Sunday from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM. We offer extended hours so you can visit us after work or on weekends.
faq.q5: Is the Hispanic clinic authorized for Green Card I-693 exams?
faq.a5: Yes, Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner is a USCIS authorized Hispanic clinic for I-693 immigration medical exams. We have a certified Civil Surgeon who completes and seals the official form.
faq.q6: How much does a medical consultation cost at Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?
faq.a6: General medical consultations at our Hispanic clinic start from $50. We offer affordable prices and payment plans so the entire Hispanic community in Houston has access to quality medical care.
faq.q7: Does the Hispanic clinic accept medical insurance?
faq.a7: Our Hispanic clinic works with various medical insurance plans. We recommend calling us at +1 (346) 226-5820 to verify if we accept your insurance. We also offer special prices for uninsured patients.
faq.q8: Where is Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner located?
faq.a8: Our Hispanic clinic is located at 1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080. We are in a convenient location with ample free parking for our patients.

bienvenidos-nueva-pagina-web.title: Welcome to Our New Website!
bienvenidos-nueva-pagina-web.excerpt: We are excited to present our new website, designed to give you a better experience and easier access to our medical services.
bienvenidos-nueva-pagina-web.content:
## Welcome to the New Website of Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner!

We are very excited to present our new website to the entire Hispanic community in Houston. This site has been designed with you and your family in mind, so you can find all the information you need about our medical services easily and quickly.

### What Will You Find on Our New Website?

- **Detailed information about all our services**: From immigration medical exams (I-693) to gynecology, ultrasounds, clinical laboratory and much more.
- **Easy-to-use contact form**: Now you can request your appointment directly from the website.
- **Hours and location information**: We are open 7 days a week, from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM.
- **Content 100% in Spanish**: Because we know it's important to communicate in your language.

### We Invite You to Visit Us

We are located at **1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080**. Our team of healthcare professionals is ready to serve you with the warmth and professionalism that characterizes us.

No appointment needed - we accept walk-in patients every day.

### Our Commitment

At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner, our commitment is to provide you with quality, accessible medical care that is 100% in Spanish. This new website is just another example of how we constantly work to improve your experience.

**We look forward to seeing you!**

📞 Call us: +1 (346) 226-5820

📍 Visit us: 1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080

privacy.title: HIPAA Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This document provides a formal summary of the manner in which Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner complies with the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act of 1996 (HIPAA) as it relates to information collected, transmitted, or stored through its official website. The Clinic is committed to maintaining the privacy, confidentiality, and security of Protected Health Information (PHI) in accordance with federal regulations and applicable state laws.
privacy.collectionText: The website may collect personal and identifying information voluntarily submitted by users, including but not limited to name, email address, telephone number, appointment requests, and limited health-related information provided through secure electronic forms.
privacy.protectionText: Any Protected Health Information submitted electronically is protected through appropriate administrative, technical, and physical safeguards, including Secure Socket Layer (SSL) encryption, restricted system access, and secure data storage protocols.
privacy.useText: Information obtained through the website is used exclusively for legitimate healthcare operations, including scheduling appointments, responding to inquiries, facilitating billing processes, and coordinating patient care. Under no circumstances is Protected Health Information sold, leased, or disclosed for unauthorized marketing purposes.
privacy.thirdPartyText: When third-party service providers are engaged in functions that involve access to PHI, the Clinic ensures that a valid Business Associate Agreement (BAA) is executed in compliance with HIPAA requirements.
privacy.rightsText: Patients retain all rights afforded under HIPAA, including the right to access their health records, request amendments to inaccurate information, request restrictions on certain disclosures, and receive an accounting of disclosures when applicable.
privacy.complaintsText: Individuals may file privacy-related complaints without fear of retaliation by contacting the Clinic's designated Privacy Officer or the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services.
privacy.disclaimerText: The information presented on the Clinic's website is intended for general informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Users are encouraged to consult directly with a qualified healthcare provider regarding any medical concerns. In the event of a medical emergency, individuals should immediately call 911 or seek appropriate emergency medical services.
privacy.notice: This summary is provided for informational purposes and does not replace the Clinic's full Notice of Privacy Practices, which is available upon request.
